### Income Statement Trend
| Metric           | Q3_FY2025 | Q2_FY2025 | Q1_FY2025 | Q4_FY2024 | Q3_FY2024 | Q2_FY2024 | Q1_FY2024 | Q4_FY2023 |

| D&A              | $25.8M    | $24.9M    | $25.6M    | $24.3M    | $23.9M    | $25.1M    | $23.9M    | $23.1M    |
| Income Tax       | $42.2M    | $41.4M    | $21.5M    | $19.1M    | $46.6M    | $30.3M    | $17.4M    | $38.3M    |
| Operating Income | $220.8M   | $215.9M   | $176.9M   | $183.8M   | $180.1M   | $178.1M   | $127.1M   | $107.4M   |
| Net Income       | $163.0M   | $152.5M   | $135.3M   | $149.3M   | $97.2M    | $126.3M   | $92.9M    | $31.0M    |
| EPS Diluted      | $1.34     | $1.26     | $1.11     | —         | $0.80     | $1.05     | $0.78     | —         |

### Derivation notes

**Q3_FY2025**:
- operating_cash_flow: derived via 9m_ytd_minus_h1, inputs: 9m_ytd from 0001043277-25-000052 (10-Q), h1_ytd from 0001043277-25-000037 (10-Q)
- capex: derived via 9m_ytd_minus_h1, inputs: 9m_ytd from 0001043277-25-000052 (10-Q), h1_ytd from 0001043277-25-000037 (10-Q)
- buybacks: derived via 9m_ytd_minus_h1, inputs: 9m_ytd from 0001043277-25-000052 (10-Q), h1_ytd from 0001043277-25-000037 (10-Q)

**Q2_FY2025**:
- operating_cash_flow: derived via h1_ytd_minus_q1, inputs: h1_ytd from 0001043277-25-000037 (10-Q), q1 from 0001043277-25-000022 (10-Q)
- capex: derived via h1_ytd_minus_q1, inputs: h1_ytd from 0001043277-25-000037 (10-Q), q1 from 0001043277-25-000022 (10-Q)
- buybacks: derived via h1_ytd_minus_q1, inputs: h1_ytd from 0001043277-25-000037 (10-Q), q1 from 0001043277-25-000022 (10-Q)

**Q4_FY2024**:
- revenue: derived via fy_minus_9m_ytd, inputs: annual from 0001043277-25-000012 (10-K), 9m_ytd from 0001043277-24-000051 (10-Q)
- depreciation_amortization: derived via fy_minus_9m_ytd, inputs: annual from 0001043277-25-000012 (10-K), 9m_ytd from 0001043277-24-000051 (10-Q)
- income_tax: derived via fy_minus_9m_ytd, inputs: annual from 0001043277-25-000012 (10-K), 9m_ytd from 0001043277-24-000051 (10-Q)
- operating_income: derived via fy_minus_9m_ytd, inputs: annual from 0001043277-25-000012 (10-K), 9m_ytd from 0001043277-24-000051 (10-Q)
- net_income: derived via fy_minus_9m_ytd, inputs: annual from 0001043277-25-000012 (10-K), 9m_ytd from 0001043277-24-000051 (10-Q)
- operating_cash_flow: derived via fy_minus_9m_ytd, inputs: annual from 0001043277-25-000012 (10-K), 9m_ytd from 0001043277-24-000051 (10-Q)
- capex: derived via fy_minus_9m_ytd, inputs: annual from 0001043277-25-000012 (10-K), 9m_ytd from 0001043277-24-000051 (10-Q)
- buybacks: derived via fy_minus_9m_ytd, inputs: annual from 0001043277-25-000012 (10-K), 9m_ytd from 0001043277-24-000051 (10-Q)
- dividends_per_share: derived via fy_minus_q1q2q3, inputs: annual from 0001043277-25-000012 (10-K), q3 from 0001043277-24-000051 (10-Q), q2 from 0001043277-24-000042 (10-Q), q1 from 0001043277-24-000026 (10-Q)
